com.pax.poslink.entity

Class TransInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    PaymentResponse.PaymentTransInfo, ReportResponse.ReportTransInfo

    public class TransInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Class TransInfo.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String ChargedAmount
      The charged amount.
      java.lang.String DiscountAmount
      The discount amount.
      java.lang.String Fps
      1 means the transaction amount less that Authorization limit and trans is offline approved.
      java.lang.String FpsReceipt
      FPS Receipt mode, default as “Both merchant /customer copy”:
      java.lang.String FpsSignature
      1 means the transaction amount less that Signature limit and no signature on receipt needed.
      java.lang.String GlobalUid
      An unique ID for each transaction.
      java.lang.String HostEchoData
      Host raw response message.
      java.lang.String HRef
      Host reference number or (Transaction UID).
      java.lang.String PinStatusNum
      PIN entry status.
      java.lang.String SettlementDate
      Transaction settlement date, the format is YYYYMMDD.
      java.lang.String SignatureStatus
      The signature status.
      java.lang.String SN
      The serial number of the device
      java.lang.String Token
      Token.
      java.lang.String UserLanguageStatus
      Get the user language status:
      java.lang.String ValidationCode
      Validation code

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Field Detail

      • DiscountAmount

        public java.lang.String DiscountAmount
        The discount amount.

        Attribute: n..9

      • ChargedAmount

        public java.lang.String ChargedAmount
        The charged amount.

        Attribute: n..9

      • SignatureStatus

        public java.lang.String SignatureStatus
        The signature status.

        “1” means local captured.
        “2” means aborted.
        “3” means timeout
        “4” means NA.
        “5” means successfully uploaded.
        “6” means failed during uploading.

        Attribute: n1

      • Fps

        public java.lang.String Fps
        1 means the transaction amount less that Authorization limit and trans is offline approved.

        Attribute: n1

      • FpsSignature

        public java.lang.String FpsSignature
        1 means the transaction amount less that Signature limit and no signature on receipt needed. And Signature on MT30 is also not needed.

        Attribute: n1/p>

      • FpsReceipt

        public java.lang.String FpsReceipt
        FPS Receipt mode, default as “Both merchant /customer copy”:

        1 - merchant only
        2 - customer only
        3 - no receipt

        Attribute: n1

      • Token

        public java.lang.String Token
        Token.

        Attribute: ans..128

      • HRef

        public java.lang.String HRef
        Host reference number or (Transaction UID). This field is host dependent; it can be used to run Void/Return transactions.

        Attribute: ans..32

      • SN

        public java.lang.String SN
        The serial number of the device

        Attribute: ans..32

      • SettlementDate

        public java.lang.String SettlementDate
        Transaction settlement date, the format is YYYYMMDD.

        Attribute: n8

      • HostEchoData

        public java.lang.String HostEchoData
        Host raw response message.

        Attribute: ans..2048

      • PinStatusNum

        public java.lang.String PinStatusNum
        PIN entry status.

        0 - PIN Bypassed.
        1 – PIN Verified.

        Attribute: n1

      • ValidationCode

        public java.lang.String ValidationCode
        Validation code

        Attribute: ans..256

      • UserLanguageStatus

        public java.lang.String UserLanguageStatus
        Get the user language status:

        1 – English
        2 – French
        3 – Chinese
        4 – Lithuanian
        5 – English UK

        Attribute: n1

      • GlobalUid

        public java.lang.String GlobalUid
        An unique ID for each transaction.

        Attribute: ans..64

    • Constructor Detail

      • TransInfo

        public TransInfo()
